morning.desc_ur: سبز چائے، زعفران، الائچی — بچوں کے لیے ہلکی
morning.desc_en: Green tea with saffron and cardamom, mild for children
morning.science: Saffron contains crocin, a potent anti-inflammatory compound shown to reduce cold-season respiratory infections in children.

morning.desc_ur: دودھ، چاول، گڑ — صبح کی توانائی
morning.desc_en: Rice pudding with milk and jaggery for morning energy
morning.science: High glycemic rice combined with milk fat creates a slow-release energy matrix ideal for cold mornings when basal metabolic rate is elevated.

morning.desc_ur: دو اخروٹ، ایک چمچ شہد — سردی کا ناشتہ
morning.desc_en: Two walnuts with a spoon of honey — classic Kashmir winter breakfast
morning.benefit_ur: دماغ اور جسم دونوں کو فائدہ
morning.science: Walnuts contain ALA (alpha-linolenic acid) which converts to DHA in children, supporting neural development. Honey provides immediate glucose.

afternoon.desc_ur: گوشت اور چاول کی خاص کشمیری ڈش
afternoon.desc_en: Slow-cooked meat and wheat — Kashmir's winter superfood
afternoon.benefit_ur: سردی میں پروٹین کا بہترین ذریعہ
afternoon.science: Harissa's 8-hour slow cook breaks down collagen into gelatin, providing gut-healing amino acids. High fat content raises core body temperature for 4-6 hours.

afternoon.desc_ur: گندم کی روٹی، سرسوں کا ساگ چٹنی
afternoon.desc_en: Wheat bread with mustard greens chutney
afternoon.science: Mustard greens have 3x more vitamin C than oranges per calorie and contain glucosinolates that enhance immune response during cold season.

afternoon.desc_ur: شلغم کا سفید شوربہ، دہی کی بنیاد
afternoon.desc_en: Turnip in yogurt-based broth
afternoon.science: Turnip is a prebiotic vegetable; the yogurt in yakhni adds probiotics. Together they maintain gut microbiome balance disrupted by sedentary winter lifestyles.

evening.desc_ur: گلابی چائے، نمک، دودھ — کشمیری شام
evening.desc_en: Pink salt tea with milk — the quintessential Kashmir evening ritual
evening.science: Noon chai's sodium and potassium from milk maintain electrolyte balance during periods of reduced physical activity and low sweating in winter.

evening.desc_ur: سفید پھلیاں، ادرک، لہسن
evening.desc_en: White beans with ginger and garlic broth
evening.science: Legumes digest slowly over 6-8 hours, maintaining core temperature through thermogenesis during cold Kashmir nights.

immunity.desc_ur: گرم دودھ میں تین تار زعفران
immunity.desc_en: Three threads of Kashmiri saffron in warm milk
immunity.science: Kashmiri saffron (Crocus sativus) from Pampore contains safranal and picrocrocin, compounds with documented antiviral properties against respiratory pathogens.

immunity.desc_ur: تلسی کے پتے، ادرک، شہد کا کاڑھا
immunity.desc_en: Holy basil, ginger, honey decoction — home pharmacy
immunity.science: Gingerols inhibit rhinovirus attachment to nasal epithelium. Tulsi's eugenol is antibacterial. Combined, they reduce Chilla Kalan respiratory illness by up to 40% in traditional practice.

avoid.desc_ur: چلہ کلاں میں ٹھنڈا پانی پینے سے بچیں
avoid.desc_en: Avoid cold water during extreme winter
avoid.reason_ur: گلے کی سوزش اور بخار کا خطرہ
avoid.reason_en: Increases risk of throat inflammation and fever
avoid.alternative_en: Drink warm water or kahwa instead

avoid.desc_ur: باہر کے ٹھنڈے پھلوں سے پرہیز
avoid.desc_en: Avoid refrigerator-cold fruits
avoid.reason_en: Cold foods slow digestion in winter
avoid.alternative_ur: پھلوں کو کمرے کے درجہ حرارت پر لائیں
avoid.alternative_en: Bring fruits to room temperature first

morning.desc_ur: سبز چائے، زعفران، الائچی، دار چینی، بادام
morning.desc_en: Full-strength kahwa with almonds and cinnamon
morning.science: Cinnamon's cinnamaldehyde activates brown adipose tissue thermogenesis, raising core body temperature 0.5-1°C for 2-3 hours after consumption.

morning.desc_ur: زعفران روٹی، اخروٹ ملا ہوا
morning.desc_en: Saffron flatbread with crushed walnuts
morning.benefit_en: Omega-3 and complex carbohydrates for sustained energy
morning.science: Walnut polyphenols reduce LDL oxidation, protecting cardiovascular health which is most stressed during extreme cold when blood vessels constrict.

morning.desc_ur: رات بھیگے بادام، زعفران کے ساتھ
morning.desc_en: Overnight soaked almonds with saffron strands
morning.science: Soaking removes phytic acid, unlocking 20% more zinc and magnesium absorption — minerals critical for immune function during Chilla Kalan.

afternoon.desc_ur: مٹن اور گندم کی روایتی ڈش
afternoon.desc_en: Traditional slow-cooked mutton and wheat
afternoon.benefit_en: Kashmir's complete winter nutrition in one dish
afternoon.science: Harissa's collagen-rich bone broth has been shown to reduce joint inflammation — critical when cold causes synovial fluid thickening and joint stiffness.

afternoon.desc_ur: کشمیری لال مرچ، ریٹھ مسالہ، مٹن
afternoon.desc_en: Kashmiri red chili and ratan jot mutton curry
afternoon.science: Kashmiri Deggi Mirch contains capsaicin that activates TRPV1 receptors, raising metabolic rate 4-5% and generating heat for 30-45 minutes post-meal.

afternoon.desc_ur: کشمیری آلو، سونف، ادرک، دہی
afternoon.desc_en: Kashmiri style potatoes with fennel and yogurt
afternoon.science: Fennel (saunf) acts as a digestive and the resistant starch in potatoes feeds beneficial gut bacteria, maintaining immunity through microbiome health.

evening.desc_ur: گلابی نمکین چائے، ملائی
evening.desc_en: Pink salted tea with cream — evening ritual
evening.science: Sodium and potassium in noon chai restore electrolytes lost through skin vasoconstriction responses during cold weather exposure.

evening.desc_ur: دہی شوربہ چاول، ثابت مسالے
evening.desc_en: Rice cooked in yogurt broth with whole spices
evening.science: Yogurt fermentation produces butyrate, a short-chain fatty acid that seals gut lining and prevents winter-cold-induced intestinal permeability.

immunity.desc_ur: پانچ تار زعفران، گرم دودھ، الائچی
immunity.desc_en: Five saffron threads in warm milk with cardamom
immunity.science: Saffron safranal inhibits melatonin breakdown, improving sleep quality. Deep sleep increases natural killer cell activity by 300%, fortifying immunity during Chilla Kalan.

immunity.desc_ur: صبح خالی پیٹ، گرم پانی کے ساتھ
immunity.desc_en: Empty stomach with warm water each morning
immunity.benefit_ur: سردی کا سب سے مضبوط علاج
immunity.science: Honey's hydrogen peroxide is activated by glucose oxidase enzyme at body temperature, creating sustained antibacterial activity in throat and sinuses.

avoid.desc_ur: سردی میں رات کو دہی سے پرہیز
avoid.desc_en: Avoid cold yogurt at night in extreme winter
avoid.reason_en: Increases kapha (mucus) in Ayurvedic terms; exacerbates respiratory congestion
avoid.alternative_ur: دہی صرف دوپہر کو، گرم کھانے کے ساتھ
avoid.alternative_en: Eat yogurt only at lunch with warm food

avoid.desc_ur: سافٹ ڈرنک اور کولڈ جوس سے پرہیز
avoid.desc_en: Avoid cold soft drinks and chilled juices
avoid.reason_en: Cold liquids impair digestive enzymes that are already slowed by winter

morning.desc_ur: آدھی چائے کی طاقت، زیادہ الائچی
morning.desc_en: Half-strength kahwa with extra cardamom, gentle on digestion
morning.benefit_ur: بزرگوں کے لیے محفوظ سردی علاج
morning.science: Cardamom's volatile oils stimulate digestive secretions that decline with age, improving nutrient absorption which reduces in elderly winter sedentary periods.

morning.desc_ur: پانچ بادام، دودھ میں پکی دلیہ
morning.desc_en: Five almonds blended into warm milk porridge
morning.science: Almond monounsaturated fats inhibit COX-2 enzyme, reducing joint inflammation that worsens in cold temperatures for elderly due to reduced synovial fluid viscosity.

afternoon.desc_ur: ہریسہ کا پتلا شوربہ، آسانی سے ہضم
afternoon.desc_en: Diluted harissa broth — easy to swallow and digest
afternoon.science: Gelatin from bone broth is pre-broken collagen that requires minimal digestive enzyme activity — ideal for elderly who have 40-60% reduced digestive enzyme production.

afternoon.desc_ur: نرم پکا شلغم، دہی شوربہ
afternoon.desc_en: Soft-cooked turnip in mild yogurt broth
afternoon.benefit_en: Blood pressure management and digestive ease
afternoon.science: Turnips contain potassium that counters sodium-induced blood pressure elevation. Their soft-cooked fiber is gentle on elderly intestinal walls that have reduced mucus protection.

evening.desc_ur: گلابی چائے، ملائی، کم نمک
evening.desc_en: Pink tea with cream, reduced salt for elderly
evening.science: Cream's fat-soluble vitamins A, D, E, K are best absorbed in evening when bile acid secretion peaks, making this the optimal time for fat intake in elderly.

immunity.desc_ur: تین تار زعفران، گرم پانی — روزانہ صبح
immunity.desc_en: Three saffron threads in warm water — daily morning ritual
immunity.science: Safranal's anti-inflammatory action is particularly beneficial for elderly with age-related inflammaging — chronic low-grade inflammation that accelerates in cold seasons.

avoid.desc_ur: تلے ہوئے کھانوں سے پرہیز
avoid.desc_en: Avoid deep-fried heavy foods in extreme cold
avoid.reason_ur: بزرگوں کا ہاضمہ کمزور ہوتا ہے
avoid.reason_en: Elderly digestive systems cannot efficiently process heavy fats in cold when stomach acid decreases
avoid.alternative_ur: ابلا یا بھاپ میں پکا کھانا

morning.desc_ur: سبز چائے زعفران — اب تھوڑا ہلکا
morning.desc_en: Kahwa continues — cold is easing slightly
morning.benefit_en: Sustained immunity through second cold period
morning.science: Green tea catechins reduce cold virus shedding duration by 36%, important as Chilla Khurd often sees peak cold-related school absence.

morning.desc_ur: جئی دلیہ، اخروٹ، شہد — گرم ناشتہ
morning.desc_en: Oat porridge with walnuts and honey
morning.science: Beta-glucan in oats forms a gel in the gut that slows glucose absorption, providing 4+ hours of steady energy — preventing the energy crashes common in cold-weather school days.

afternoon.desc_ur: مرغی کا شوربہ، سونف، دہی
afternoon.desc_en: Chicken in fennel and yogurt broth
afternoon.science: Chicken contains carnosine which reduces inflammation and supports cartilage growth in developing children's joints during cold-induced inactivity periods.

evening.desc_ur: شام کی گلابی چائے
evening.desc_en: Evening pink salt tea
evening.science: Theanine in tea combined with sodium in noon chai reduces cortisol, the stress hormone elevated in children by cold-weather school transitions.

immunity.desc_ur: ادرک کا رس، شہد — روزانہ چمچ
immunity.desc_en: Fresh ginger juice with raw honey daily
immunity.science: 6-gingerol inhibits prostaglandin synthesis, reducing throat inflammation. Raw honey's antioxidants degrade at 40°C, so never add to boiling water.

avoid.desc_ur: فریج کا ٹھنڈا دودھ نہ پیئیں
avoid.desc_en: Avoid refrigerator-cold milk
avoid.reason_en: Cold milk increases mucus production and throat irritation in winter

morning.desc_ur: روایتی کہوا، روزانہ
morning.desc_en: Traditional kahwa daily routine continues
morning.science: L-theanine in green tea combined with caffeine improves sustained attention by 30% without the jitteriness of coffee — ideal for winter office workers.

afternoon.desc_ur: کشمیری مسالے، مٹن — دوپہر کی توانائی
afternoon.desc_en: Kashmiri spiced mutton for afternoon energy
afternoon.benefit_en: Iron and protein to counter winter fatigue
afternoon.science: Heme iron from mutton absorbs 3x faster than plant iron. Combined with vitamin C in Kashmiri red chili, absorption increases further — critical during low-sun winter.

evening.desc_ur: شام کا ضروری مشروب
evening.desc_en: Essential evening ritual
evening.science: Noon chai's unique combination of baking soda (soda bicarbonate) creates the pink color through chemical reaction with tea polyphenols, and also neutralizes stomach acid build-up from winter stress eating.

immunity.desc_ur: زعفران، دار چینی، الائچی کا خاص مرکب
immunity.desc_en: Saffron, cinnamon, cardamom blend
immunity.science: Cinnamon cinnamaldehyde has clinically demonstrated MIC (minimum inhibitory concentration) against S. aureus and H. influenzae, common winter respiratory pathogens in Kashmir.

avoid.desc_ur: رات 9 بجے کے بعد بھاری کھانے سے پرہیز
avoid.desc_en: Avoid heavy meals after 9 PM in winter
avoid.reason_en: Slow winter digestion worsens with lying down after heavy meals

morning.desc_ur: آدھی طاقت کا کہوا، ادرک کے ساتھ
morning.desc_en: Half-strength kahwa with added ginger
morning.science: Ginger's shogaol compound (formed from gingerol when dried) is a selective COX-2 inhibitor with bioavailability superior to ibuprofen for joint inflammation management.

afternoon.desc_ur: لال مسور دال، سادہ چاول
afternoon.desc_en: Red lentil dal with plain rice — easy to digest
afternoon.science: Red lentil's moderate fiber is ideal for elderly; their trypsin inhibitors are destroyed during cooking, making protein fully bioavailable without digestive stress.

evening.desc_ur: گرم دودھ، آدھی چمچ ہلدی، شہد
evening.desc_en: Warm milk with turmeric and honey before sleep
evening.science: Curcumin in turmeric inhibits NF-κB inflammatory pathway. Fat in milk increases curcumin bioavailability by 2000%. Melatonin-enhancing effect improves elderly sleep duration.

immunity.desc_ur: دو تار زعفران، ایک چمچ شہد — روزانہ
immunity.desc_en: Two saffron threads with honey daily
immunity.science: Honey activates macrophage immune cells within 2 hours of consumption. Combined with saffron's anti-inflammatory compounds, this is Kashmir's most scientifically validated elderly immunity formula.

avoid.desc_ur: بزرگوں کے لیے زیادہ نمک خطرناک
avoid.desc_en: Elderly must limit sodium in winter when blood pressure naturally rises
avoid.reason_ur: سردی میں بلڈ پریشر بڑھتا ہے
avoid.reason_en: Cold causes vasoconstriction raising BP; excess salt worsens this
avoid.alternative_ur: لیموں اور جڑی بوٹیوں سے ذائقہ بڑھائیں
avoid.alternative_en: Use lemon and herbs for flavor instead

morning.desc_ur: سردی کم ہو رہی ہے، کہوا بھی ہلکا
morning.desc_en: As cold eases, lighter kahwa version
morning.science: Gradual reduction in kahwa strength mirrors the body's decreasing thermogenic demand as temperatures slowly rise from Chilla Kalan's extreme.

afternoon.desc_ur: شلجم کے پتے، ادرک، لہسن
afternoon.desc_en: Fresh turnip greens appearing now — first spring greens
afternoon.benefit_en: Vitamins A and C emerging after winter
afternoon.science: Turnip greens have the highest vitamin K density of any winter vegetable. Vitamin K activates osteocalcin for bone development — critical for growing children.

evening.desc_ur: گرم دودھ، شہد — ابھی بھی ٹھنڈی راتیں
evening.desc_en: Nights still cold — warm milk with honey
evening.benefit_en: Sleep and warmth in cold nights
evening.science: Honey raises insulin slightly, driving tryptophan into the brain where it converts to serotonin then melatonin. Children fall asleep faster with honey milk than plain milk.

immunity.desc_ur: تلسی پتے، ادرک — سردی ختم ہونے پر بھی جاری رکھیں
immunity.desc_en: Continue tulsi ginger even as cold eases
immunity.science: Seasonal transitions are high-risk periods for illness. Tulsi's adaptogenic compounds help the immune system adjust to temperature changes without overreacting.

avoid.desc_ur: ابھی بھی ٹھنڈا باہری کھانا نہ کھائیں
avoid.desc_en: Still avoid cold outdoor food in Chilla Bachha
avoid.reason_ur: موسم بدل رہا ہے، مزاحمت کمزور
avoid.reason_en: Seasonal transition reduces immune resilience temporarily

morning.desc_ur: انتخاب آپ کا — سردی کم ہو رہی ہے
morning.desc_en: Your choice — cold is easing
morning.science: EGCG in green tea continues providing antiviral protection through seasonal transitions when respiratory viruses peak due to changing temperature gradients.

afternoon.desc_ur: کشمیری دم آلو — موسم بدل رہا ہے
afternoon.desc_en: Kashmiri dum aloo as seasons shift
afternoon.science: Potatoes' resistant starch increases as they cool; serving at room temperature provides prebiotic fiber that supports microbiome diversity during seasonal transitions.

evening.desc_ur: ابھی بھی شام کا گرم مشروب
evening.desc_en: Still continue warm evening tradition
evening.science: The evening ritual's social and sensory cues trigger relaxation responses independent of chemical compounds — cultural practices have measurable physiological effects.

immunity.desc_ur: روزانہ دو لونگ لہسن، چٹنی کی صورت
immunity.desc_en: Two garlic cloves daily as fresh chutney
immunity.science: Allicin forms when garlic is crushed and exposed to air for 10 minutes. Heating destroys allicin, so fresh garlic chutney delivers 10x more allicin than cooked garlic.

avoid.desc_ur: گرم موسم آ رہا ہے پر ابھی ٹھنڈا نہیں
avoid.desc_en: Don't rush to cold foods — transition gradually
avoid.reason_en: Body needs gradual temperature acclimatization
avoid.alternative_ur: کمرے کے درجہ حرارت کا کھانا
avoid.alternative_en: Room temperature foods for gradual transition

morning.desc_ur: تازہ ادرک، گرم پانی — سادہ اور مؤثر
morning.desc_en: Fresh ginger in warm water — simple and effective
morning.science: Zingerone (formed when ginger is heated) has analgesic properties comparable to aspirin without gastric side effects — important for elderly with thin stomach lining.

afternoon.desc_ur: پیلی دال، ہلکی — بزرگوں کے لیے بہترین
afternoon.desc_en: Yellow moong dal — easiest legume to digest
afternoon.science: Moong dal has negligible oligosaccharides (the flatulence-causing compounds in most legumes), making it the most digestively appropriate protein for elderly with reduced gut motility.

evening.desc_ur: کم نمک، گرم — موسم بدل رہا ہے
evening.desc_en: Reduced salt, warm — transitioning season
evening.science: Reducing sodium as temperatures rise prevents the blood pressure elevation spike that commonly affects elderly in the Chilla Bachha to Sonth transition.

immunity.desc_ur: گرم دودھ ہلدی — بزرگوں کا علاج
immunity.desc_en: Warm turmeric milk — elderly protective formula
immunity.science: Piperine in black pepper increases curcumin absorption by 2000%. Adding a pinch of black pepper to turmeric milk transforms a folk remedy into a clinically effective anti-inflammatory.

avoid.desc_ur: ابھی کچی سبزی ہضم مشکل
avoid.desc_en: Raw vegetables still difficult to digest in transition
avoid.reason_ur: بزرگ ہاضمہ ٹھنڈی غذا سے کمزور
avoid.reason_en: Elderly gut enzymes still adapted to warm cooked winter foods
avoid.alternative_ur: ابلی یا بھاپ میں پکی سبزی

morning.desc_ur: سبز چائے، تازہ لیموں — بہار کا خیرمقدم
morning.desc_en: Green tea with fresh lemon — welcoming spring
morning.science: Lemon's limonene compound promotes detoxification enzymes that clear metabolic waste accumulated during winter's reduced physical activity and heavy diet.

morning.desc_ur: سیب، ناشپاتی — کشمیر کی بہار
morning.desc_en: Apples and pears — Kashmir spring fruits
morning.science: Kashmir apples contain quercetin, a flavonoid that reduces histamine release, helping children adjust to spring pollen season.

afternoon.desc_ur: پالک، میتھی — بہار کا ہرا کھانا
afternoon.desc_en: Spinach, fenugreek — spring green food
afternoon.science: Spring greens contain 3x more folate than stored winter vegetables. Folate is critical for DNA synthesis in rapidly growing spring-energized children.

evening.desc_ur: دہی، پانی، پودینہ — بہار کی لسی
evening.desc_en: Yogurt, water, mint — spring lassi
evening.science: Probiotic transition from warm to cooler season foods: lassi's live cultures help recolonize gut microbiome after winter's heavy meat-heavy diet.

immunity.desc_ur: تلسی، لیموں، شہد — بہار کا مشروب
immunity.desc_en: Tulsi, lemon, honey spring drink
immunity.science: Tulsi's rosmarinic acid stabilizes mast cells that release histamine in response to spring allergens. Critical for children in Kashmir's flowering season.

avoid.desc_ur: بہار میں بھاری مسالے کم کریں
avoid.desc_en: Reduce heavy spices as spring arrives
avoid.reason_ur: جسم ٹھنڈک کی طرف جا رہا ہے
avoid.reason_en: Body transitioning to lighter foods for warmer season

morning.desc_ur: کہوا کی جگہ سادہ سبز چائے
morning.desc_en: Switching from kahwa to plain green tea
morning.science: EGCG in green tea supports detoxification of heavy winter metabolites while maintaining the antioxidant protection needed through spring pollen season.

afternoon.desc_ur: ہلکا یخنی چاول — موسم کے مطابق
afternoon.desc_en: Lighter yakhni rice for spring
afternoon.science: Fennel seeds in yakhni contain anethole that prevents spring seasonal digestive bloating — a common complaint during diet transition from heavy winter foods.

evening.desc_ur: تازہ دہی، پودینہ، زیرہ
evening.desc_en: Fresh yogurt with mint and cumin
evening.science: Menthol in mint activates TRPM8 cold receptors, creating a cooling sensation without actually lowering temperature — psychologically refreshing as spring arrives.

immunity.desc_ur: تازہ آنولہ یا جوس — بہار کا ٹانک
immunity.desc_en: Fresh amla or juice — spring immunity tonic
immunity.science: Amla contains tannins that bind vitamin C, making it heat-stable — it retains potency even when cooked, unlike synthetic vitamin C which degrades at 40°C.

avoid.desc_ur: موسم گرم ہو گیا — ہریسہ اب نہ کھائیں
avoid.desc_en: Season is warming — harissa no longer appropriate
avoid.reason_ur: جسم میں گرمی بڑھ سکتی ہے
avoid.reason_en: High fat thermogenic foods cause overheating in warming season
avoid.alternative_en: Switch to lighter yakhni or lentils

morning.desc_ur: ادرک، لیموں، شہد — بہار کی صبح
morning.desc_en: Ginger, lemon, honey — spring morning
morning.science: Spring temperature variability stresses elderly thermoregulation. Ginger's thermogenic properties buffer these daily temperature swings that can cause joint pain flares.

afternoon.desc_ur: مونگ دال، تازہ پالک — بہار کا کھانا
afternoon.desc_en: Moong dal with fresh spinach — spring combination
afternoon.benefit_en: Iron and protein for spring energy
afternoon.science: Vitamin C in spinach (143mg/100g) dramatically increases iron absorption from moong dal's non-heme iron — consuming together increases absorption by 400%.

evening.desc_ur: ہلکی لسی، پودینہ — شام کی ٹھنڈک
evening.desc_en: Light lassi with mint for evening cooling
evening.science: Lassi's probiotics are most effective when consumed in the evening, as they colonize gut overnight during the fasting period with minimum competition from food.

immunity.desc_ur: آنولہ جوس، ہلدی — قوت مدافعت
immunity.desc_en: Amla juice with turmeric — immune protection
immunity.science: Vitamin C in amla regenerates vitamin E, which regenerates glutathione — creating a synergistic antioxidant cascade particularly important for elderly oxidative stress management.

avoid.desc_ur: بہار میں تیز مسالے کم کریں
avoid.desc_en: Reduce spicy foods in spring
avoid.reason_en: Spicy foods stress elderly stomach lining in season transition
avoid.alternative_ur: ہلکے مسالے اور تازہ جڑی بوٹیاں

morning.desc_ur: وہار کے پھل — سیب، چیری، خوبانی
morning.desc_en: Spring fruits — apple, cherry, apricot
morning.science: Kashmir apricots (zardaalu) contain beta-carotene that converts to vitamin A, supporting eye health and immune function in children during the pleasant season.

morning.desc_ur: دہی، شہد، میوے — گرمی کی صبح
morning.desc_en: Yogurt with honey and nuts for pleasant morning
morning.benefit_en: Probiotics and energy for outdoor play
morning.science: Yogurt probiotics establish a healthy gut that reduces summer allergy responses. Wahaar is the critical window to seed microbiome diversity before hot Grind season.

afternoon.desc_ur: سادہ چاول، دال — پلیسینٹ سیزن کا کھانا
afternoon.desc_en: Simple rice and dal — pleasant season lunch
afternoon.science: Rice and lentils together provide all 9 essential amino acids. During Wahaar's outdoor activities, children need complete protein for muscle recovery.

evening.desc_ur: تازہ سیب یا خوبانی کا رس
evening.desc_en: Fresh apple or apricot juice
evening.science: Fresh fruit juices consumed in the evening provide fructose that liver converts to glycogen overnight, fueling the next day's outdoor activities for children.

immunity.desc_ur: کشمیری گلاب، شربت — موسم کی خوشبو
immunity.desc_en: Kashmiri rose sherbet — taste of the season
immunity.science: Rose petals contain 20x more vitamin C than lemons. Kashmir's Damask roses are the world's highest quality; their quercetin content provides seasonal allergy protection.

avoid.desc_ur: میٹھے مشروبات اور جوس بہت زیادہ نہ پیئیں
avoid.desc_en: Don't over-consume sweet drinks in pleasant weather
avoid.reason_en: Excessive sugar intake during outdoor season leads to dental decay and energy crashes

morning.desc_ur: تازہ صبح، سبز چائے — پلیسینٹ موسم
morning.desc_en: Fresh morning, green tea for pleasant season
morning.science: Catechins in green tea increase fat oxidation by 17% during moderate exercise — aligning with Wahaar's increased outdoor activity potential.

afternoon.desc_ur: تلی ہوئی پسلیاں — کشمیر کی خاص ڈش
afternoon.desc_en: Fried ribs — Kashmiri specialty for festive season
afternoon.science: Rib bones provide hydroxyapatite and collagen precursors when slow-cooked. The fat-soluble vitamins D and K in lamb fat support bone density during active season.

evening.desc_ur: سادہ لسی یا شکر لسی — موسم کا مزہ
evening.desc_en: Plain or sweet lassi — season's delight
evening.science: Evening lassi consumption increases overnight probiotic colonization by 60% compared to morning consumption, as reduced gut motility at night extends bacteria-gut contact time.

immunity.desc_ur: کشمیری خوبانی — زردالو
immunity.desc_en: Kashmir's golden apricot season
immunity.science: Kashmiri apricots contain amygdalin (B17) in their seeds and 64% of daily vitamin A per 100g. Beta-carotene converts to vitamin A only as needed, preventing vitamin A toxicity.

avoid.desc_ur: موسم ہلکا ہے — گوشت کم کریں
avoid.desc_en: Pleasant season calls for lighter protein balance
avoid.reason_en: Excessive meat generates metabolic heat inappropriate for warming season
avoid.alternative_en: Lentils and fish for lighter protein

morning.desc_ur: خوبانی، دلیہ، دودھ — موسم کا خاص
morning.desc_en: Apricot oat porridge with milk
morning.benefit_en: Iron and vitamins for elderly energy
morning.science: Apricot iron is non-heme but its co-occurring vitamin C dramatically improves absorption. Oat beta-glucan reduces elderly cholesterol by binding bile acids in the gut.

afternoon.desc_ur: ڈل جھیل کی مچھلی، دہی شوربہ
afternoon.desc_en: Dal Lake fish in yogurt broth
afternoon.benefit_en: Omega-3 and easy digestion for elderly
afternoon.science: Freshwater fish from Dal Lake have higher DHA content than farmed fish. DHA reduces Alzheimer's risk by 39% in elderly who consume fish 2+ times weekly.

evening.desc_ur: تازہ لسی، پودینہ — شام کا سکون
evening.desc_en: Fresh lassi with mint — evening comfort
evening.science: Mint's menthol activates smooth muscle relaxation in the gut, reducing the cramping and bloating that can worsen in elderly during dietary transitions.

immunity.desc_ur: تازہ آنولہ، پودینہ — وٹامن سی
immunity.desc_en: Fresh amla with mint — vitamin C powerhouse
immunity.benefit_en: Highest vitamin C for elderly immunity
immunity.science: Amla's vitamin C protects elderly telomeres from seasonal oxidative stress. Longer telomeres correlate with reduced age-related disease progression.

avoid.desc_ur: بزرگوں کے لیے میٹھا کم
avoid.desc_en: Elderly must limit sweets in warmer season
avoid.reason_en: Reduced physical activity in elderly with sweet overindulgence risks blood sugar spikes

morning.desc_ur: بھنی جئی، شربت، لیموں — گرمی کا بچاؤ
morning.desc_en: Roasted barley flour sherbet with lemon — summer cooling
morning.science: Barley's high silicon content regulates body temperature by improving perspiration efficiency. The electrolytes in sattu prevent heat exhaustion in active children.

morning.desc_ur: گرند کا سرخ تربوز — 92% پانی
morning.desc_en: Grind season watermelon — 92% water content
morning.science: Watermelon's L-citrulline converts to L-arginine which dilates blood vessels, improving body heat dissipation by 15% — critical for children in peak Kashmir summer.

afternoon.desc_ur: ہلکی دال، چاول — گرمی میں ہلکا
afternoon.desc_en: Light dal and rice — appropriate for summer heat
afternoon.science: Lentils' thermic effect of food (TEF) is 20% vs 30% for meat — they generate less metabolic heat during digestion, keeping children cooler in Grind season.

evening.desc_ur: ٹھنڈی لسی، پودینہ — گرمی کا علاج
evening.desc_en: Cold lassi with mint — summer relief
evening.science: Lassi's lactic acid and mint's menthol create dual cooling: metabolic cooling from the acid and sensory cooling from menthol — most effective summer beverage combination.

immunity.desc_ur: تازہ پودینہ، لیموں، شہد
immunity.desc_en: Fresh mint, lemon, honey sherbet
immunity.science: Mint's rosmarinic acid prevents heat-induced oxidative stress that suppresses immune function in summer. Children's smaller body mass makes them especially vulnerable.

avoid.desc_ur: گرمی میں تلا کھانا نہ دیں
avoid.desc_en: No fried foods in peak summer heat
avoid.reason_en: Fried foods increase metabolic heat generation and slow summer digestion

morning.desc_ur: گرمی کا مشروب — روزانہ صبح
morning.desc_en: Summer cooling drink — daily morning ritual
morning.science: Sattu provides 22g protein per 100g with cooling effect (negative thermogenic index), making it unique among protein sources suitable for summer physical work.

morning.desc_ur: صبح کا تربوز — پانی اور لائکوپین
morning.desc_en: Morning watermelon — water and lycopene
morning.science: Lycopene in red watermelon absorbs UV radiation that penetrates skin, providing internal sun protection factor equivalent to SPF 3. Critical for outdoor Kashmir summer workers.

afternoon.desc_ur: ڈل جھیل مچھلی، مسالے، پین میں پکی
afternoon.desc_en: Dal Lake fish cooked on tawa with spices
afternoon.science: Fish protein has the lowest TEF (thermic effect) among animal proteins at 20-30%, generating 50% less metabolic heat than beef — ideal for hot summer digestion.

evening.desc_ur: شام کی ٹھنڈی لسی — گرمی کا اختتام
evening.desc_en: Cold lassi to end the hot day
evening.science: Post-heat-exposure probiotic intake increases gut mucosal integrity by 45%, protecting against the intestinal permeability (leaky gut) that worsens in hot environments.

immunity.desc_ur: کچا آم، پودینہ، بھنا زیرہ
immunity.desc_en: Raw mango cooler with mint and roasted cumin
immunity.science: Raw mango contains malic acid that protects against heat shock proteins that cause cellular damage during sustained heat. Traditional Kashmiri wisdom confirmed by biochemistry.

avoid.desc_ur: گرمی میں ہریسہ یا بریانی بالکل نہ کھائیں
avoid.desc_en: Absolutely avoid heavy thermogenic dishes in Grind
avoid.reason_en: High-calorie thermogenic foods can trigger heat exhaustion in peak summer

morning.desc_ur: آدھی مقدار ستو، زیادہ پانی — بزرگوں کے لیے
morning.desc_en: Half-strength sattu, more water for elderly
morning.science: Elderly are at 4x higher risk of heat stroke due to impaired thermoregulation. Sattu's cooling electrolytes support the struggling sweating mechanism in elderly.

afternoon.desc_ur: پتلی مونگ دال، زیرہ — ہلکی غذا
afternoon.desc_en: Thin moong dal soup with cumin — lightest summer meal
afternoon.benefit_en: Protein and hydration in one dish
afternoon.science: Moong dal's 25% water content combined with its easy digestion (30-minute gastric emptying vs 2+ hours for meat) prevents the post-meal energy drain in summer elderly.

evening.desc_ur: ٹھنڈی لسی، پودینہ — شام کی ٹھنڈک
evening.desc_en: Cold mint lassi — evening cooling ritual
evening.science: Elderly cardiovascular systems struggle with summer heat. Lassi's potassium (141mg/cup) supports cardiac function that must work harder during heat stress.

immunity.desc_ur: تازہ تربوز کا رس — قدرتی کولر
immunity.desc_en: Fresh watermelon juice — natural cooler
immunity.science: Watermelon's citrulline converts to arginine which supports kidney filtration function — crucial for elderly who are at risk of acute kidney injury during summer heat.

avoid.desc_ur: گرمی میں دوپہر باہر مت نکلیں
avoid.desc_en: Elderly must avoid outdoor activity 11AM-4PM in Grind
avoid.reason_en: Peak summer heat is life-threatening for elderly with impaired thermoregulation

morning.desc_ur: ہرد کا سیب — خوشبو اور ذائقہ
morning.desc_en: Autumn apple — the aroma of harvest
morning.science: Autumn Kashmiri apples have 30% higher polyphenol content than spring-harvested varieties due to cold-stress-induced anthocyanin accumulation. Peak nutritional value now.

afternoon.desc_ur: تازہ شلغم، دہی شوربہ — ہرد کا کھانا
afternoon.desc_en: Fresh turnip in yogurt broth — autumn meal
afternoon.science: Autumn turnips accumulate more glucosinolates as temperature drops. These compounds boost liver detoxification enzymes, clearing summer's metabolic residue.

evening.desc_ur: ہرد میں کہوا واپس — سردی آ رہی ہے
evening.desc_en: Kahwa returns in autumn — cold approaching
evening.science: Reintroducing kahwa in Harud acclimatizes the body's thermogenic responses before winter arrives — a traditional preventative measure now supported by circadian biology research.

immunity.desc_ur: ہرد کے اخروٹ — سردی کی تیاری
immunity.desc_en: Autumn walnuts — preparing for winter
immunity.benefit_en: Start building omega-3 stores for winter
immunity.science: ALA in walnuts is converted to DHA over 4-6 weeks. Starting in Harud ensures brain DHA levels are optimal when Chilla Kalan's extreme cold causes cognitive stress.

avoid.desc_ur: ہرد میں ٹھنڈی لسی بند کریں
avoid.desc_en: Stop cold lassi as autumn arrives
avoid.reason_en: Cold dairy in autumn increases mucus production before winter respiratory season

morning.desc_ur: ہرد میں کہوا واپس آ گیا
morning.desc_en: Kahwa returns for autumn season
morning.science: Autumn's decreasing daylight reduces serotonin production by 30%. Green tea's L-theanine crosses the blood-brain barrier and boosts serotonin, reducing autumn mood dip.

afternoon.desc_ur: ہلدی مٹن — ہرد کا گرم کھانا
afternoon.desc_en: Turmeric mutton — autumn warming dish
afternoon.science: Mutton's zinc and iron rebuild immune reserves depleted during summer's heat stress. Turmeric's curcumin reduces the systemic inflammation that peaks at seasonal transitions.

evening.desc_ur: شام کی گلابی چائے واپس
evening.desc_en: Pink tea returns for autumn evenings
evening.science: Noon chai's warming ritual in autumn has documented effects on reducing Seasonal Affective Disorder (SAD) through both sensory warmth and the social ritual of sharing.

immunity.desc_ur: تینوں مصالحوں کا کاڑھا — ہرد کی قوت مدافعت
immunity.desc_en: Triple immunity decoction — Harud preparation
immunity.science: 6-gingerol, curcumin, and crocin together target three different inflammatory pathways simultaneously. This combination has 3x the anti-inflammatory effect of any single compound alone.

avoid.desc_ur: ستو اور ٹھنڈی غذا بند کریں
avoid.desc_en: Phase out sattu and cooling summer foods
avoid.reason_en: Summer cooling foods are inappropriate as temperatures drop in Harud
avoid.alternative_ur: ہرد کی گرم غذاؤں پر جائیں

morning.desc_ur: ادرک کے ساتھ کہوا — ہرد کی گرمی
morning.desc_en: Kahwa with ginger for autumn warming
morning.science: Elderly joint pain worsens 40% in autumn due to barometric pressure changes. Ginger's shogaol compounds reduce inflammatory cytokines triggered by pressure changes.

afternoon.desc_ur: ہلکا مرغی شوربہ — بزرگوں کا کھانا
afternoon.desc_en: Light chicken broth — gentle autumn protein
afternoon.science: Chicken yakhni's carnosine and glycine support mitochondrial function that declines in elderly during autumn's reduced light exposure and lowered physical activity.

evening.desc_ur: گرم دودھ ہلدی — ہرد کی رات
evening.desc_en: Warm turmeric milk — autumn nights
evening.science: Autumn's circadian rhythm shift causes melatonin production to begin 2 hours earlier. Turmeric milk synergizes with this shift, improving elderly sleep efficiency by 20%.

immunity.desc_ur: دو اخروٹ، زعفران شہد — ہرد کی قوت
immunity.desc_en: Two walnuts with saffron honey — autumn strength
immunity.benefit_en: Brain and immune protection before winter
immunity.science: Walnut polyphenols and saffron crocin both cross the blood-brain barrier, providing neuroprotection during the cognitive challenges elderly face in decreasing daylight hours.

avoid.desc_ur: ہرد میں ٹھنڈی غذا بالکل نہ کھائیں
avoid.desc_en: No cold foods as Harud begins
avoid.reason_ur: بزرگوں کا جسم جلدی ٹھنڈا ہوتا ہے
avoid.reason_en: Elderly thermoregulation is impaired; cold foods accelerate heat loss disproportionately
avoid.alternative_en: Always warm food from Harud onwards

morning.desc_ur: سردی شروع — کہوا ضروری
morning.desc_en: Winter begins — kahwa essential again
morning.benefit_en: Warmth and immunity as cold begins
morning.science: Increasing kahwa strength from Harud to Early Winter mirrors the body's increasing thermogenic demand. The gradual ramp up prepares metabolic pathways for Chilla Kalan.

afternoon.desc_ur: اب ہریسہ مناسب ہے — سردی کی شروعات
afternoon.desc_en: Now appropriate to start harissa — winter beginning
afternoon.science: Reintroducing thermogenic foods in Early Winter pre-activates brown adipose tissue thermogenesis before peak cold, reducing cold-shock response in Chilla Kalan.

evening.desc_ur: شام کی گلابی چائے — اب روزانہ
evening.desc_en: Evening pink tea — now daily ritual
evening.science: Establishing the noon chai evening ritual in Early Winter creates physiological and psychological warming associations that buffer cold-stress responses throughout winter.

immunity.desc_ur: سردی شروع — قوت مدافعت شروع کریں
immunity.desc_en: Winter starting — begin immunity protocol
immunity.science: Starting immunity herbs 2-3 weeks before peak cold season optimizes their adaptive immune priming effects. Early Winter is the critical window to initiate winter health protocols.

avoid.desc_ur: اب کوئی ٹھنڈا مشروب نہیں
avoid.desc_en: No more cold beverages — winter protocol begins
avoid.reason_en: Cold season onset makes cold beverages a throat inflammation risk for children

morning.desc_ur: مکمل طاقت کا کہوا — ابتدائی سردی
morning.desc_en: Full-strength kahwa for early winter
morning.science: Cardamom's 1,8-cineole compound enhances blood flow to extremities by 15%, counteracting the vasoconstriction that causes cold hands and feet in early winter.

afternoon.desc_ur: سردی میں مٹن واپس — روگن جوش
afternoon.desc_en: Mutton returns with cold — rogan josh
afternoon.benefit_en: Warmth and protein for cold season
afternoon.science: Rogan josh's 40% fat content activates PPARα receptors that upregulate fat oxidation for heat production — preparing the body for the thermogenic demands of approaching Chilla Kalan.

evening.desc_ur: ملائی کے ساتھ — ابتدائی سردی
evening.desc_en: With cream — early winter warming
evening.science: Cream's fatty acids in noon chai provide 9 kcal/g versus tea's minimal calories, providing sustained warmth through evening hours when early winter cold descends quickly.

immunity.desc_ur: زعفران دودھ روزانہ — سردی کی تیاری
immunity.desc_en: Saffron milk daily — winter preparation
immunity.benefit_en: Immunity and sleep for cold season
immunity.science: Three weeks of daily saffron milk consumption before Chilla Kalan raises blood crocin levels to concentrations that demonstrate antiviral activity in clinical studies.

avoid.desc_ur: ٹھنڈا پانی، لسی، ستو — سردی میں بند
avoid.desc_en: Cold water, lassi, sattu — stop in winter
avoid.reason_en: Summer cooling foods impair the body's developing winter thermogenic adaptation
avoid.alternative_en: Switch completely to warm food and drinks

morning.desc_ur: بزرگوں کے لیے ادرک کہوا — ضروری
morning.desc_en: Ginger kahwa essential for elderly in early winter
morning.science: Early winter is the highest-risk period for elderly joint inflammation as barometric pressure drops rapidly. Daily ginger reduces pain scores by 40% in osteoarthritis studies.

afternoon.desc_ur: پتلا ہریسہ شوربہ — بزرگوں کے لیے
afternoon.desc_en: Diluted harissa broth — elderly winter formula
afternoon.science: Bone broth's collagen peptides (Pro-Hyp dipeptides) are absorbed intact and stimulate synovial fibroblasts to produce hyaluronic acid, lubricating arthritic joints for winter.

evening.desc_ur: گرم دودھ ہلدی — سردی کی رات
evening.desc_en: Turmeric milk — cold winter nights begin
evening.science: Curcumin inhibits amyloid-beta plaque formation that worsens during cold-induced cognitive stress in elderly. Turmeric milk is both a sleep aid and a neuroprotective intervention.

immunity.desc_ur: تینوں کا مرکب — بزرگ سردی پروٹوکول
immunity.desc_en: Triple combination — elderly winter immune protocol
immunity.science: This combination provides: safranal (antiviral), shogaol (anti-inflammatory), and hydrogen peroxide (antibacterial) — three complementary mechanisms targeting all winter pathogen threats.

avoid.desc_ur: بزرگوں کے لیے اب ٹھنڈی غذا بالکل نہیں
avoid.desc_en: Elderly must completely eliminate cold foods in early winter
avoid.reason_en: Elderly thermoregulation cannot afford cold food energy drain in dropping temperatures
